mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to equity cash flows, compressing valuation multiples and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 5.0%, labor market tightness accelerates wage growth and consumer spending, boosting corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day forward returns in more than 60% of instances where UNRATE drops below 5.0, or the signal's predictive power vanishes after controlling for FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in industrial production and housing starts indicates broad-based economic acceleration, which expands profit margins and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a baseline buy-and-hold strategy in out-of-sample walk-forward testing, or the interaction term's coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.10) in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: In periods where CPIAUCSL rises above 2.5% year-over-year, rising inflation expectations compress real yields and trigger a rotation into equities, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns turn negative when CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5% YoY for three consecutive months, or the signal's directional accuracy drops below 50% in inflationary regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales and credit availability (RSAFS) reflect sustained consumer demand, which directly supports corporate revenue growth and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The rolling 6-month correlation between RSAFS momentum and SPX 5-day returns falls below 0.10, or forward returns are statistically indistinguishable from zero across all market conditions.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO declines for two consecutive months, supply chain bottlenecks or demand weakness signal impending earnings downgrades, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in more than 60% of triggered instances, or the signal's predictive power is fully absorbed by UNRATE movements.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where PAYEMS rises but UNRATE remains sticky above 5.5% indicates structural labor shortages rather than cyclical hiring, which compresses margins and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term fails to predict negative returns in out-of-sample testing, or SPX forward returns are positive when PAYEMS growth exceeds 200k monthly while UNRATE stays above 5.5%.

mechanism_narrative: When quarterly real GDP growth exceeds 3.0%, earnings momentum accelerates and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days, provided the macro environment is not in a recession.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day forward returns are negative in more than 50% of instances where GDPC1 growth exceeds 3.0%, or the signal's information coefficient drops below 0.05 in a 3-year rolling window.
